word: H3074 - יְהֹוָה שָׁמָּה - Yᵉhôvâh shâmmâh - yeh-ho-vaw' shawm'-maw - Jehovahshammah

sections.paragraph:
Original: יהוה שׁמּה

Transliteration: yehôvâh shâmmâh

Phonetic: yeh-ho-vaw' shawm'-maw

BDB Definition:

Jehovah-shammah = "Jehovah is there"
  1. a symbolic name for Jerusalem

Origin: from H3068 and H8033 with directive enclitic

TWOT entry: None

Part(s) of speech: Proper Name Location
